description: Open-weights floor manifest for Invariant 17. Three pin formats are accepted, dispatched per-format by xion-verify inference-sovereignty: 'sentinel' (byte-stable structural stand-in proving the floor wiring), 'provenance-record' (content-addressed operator declaration about the runtime daemon), and 'model-blob' (content-addressed hash of an upstream model artifact, the Invariant 17 clause 2(iii) full-hash branch). The model-blob entry's local-file path is supplied by the operator at runtime via the env var named in 'model_blob_env_var'; absent path resolves to NOT_YET_SEALED for that entry only. Strengthening history is tracked in KNOWN_WEAKNESSES.md § KW-INFERENCE-001.

open_weights.notes: Content-addressed placeholder proving the floor wiring; not a real model.

First real open-weights floor pin. The sha256 content-addresses the operator's provenance record, NOT the model weights themselves. Runtime floor is held by OllamaGenerativeProvider(provider_id='ollama') against a local Ollama daemon; health() checks daemon reachability plus presence of XION_OLLAMA_FLOOR_MODEL in GET /api/tags. The next-tier strengthening to a content-addressed model-blob pin (per Invariant 17 clause 2(iii) full-hash branch) is the gemma4-e4b-it-q4-k-m-gguf entry below. Companion strengthening history: KNOWN_WEAKNESSES.md § KW-INFERENCE-001.

Upstream Hugging Face GGUF pin for the Gemma 4 E4B-it Q4_K_M quant (Genesis Default floor model post-Phase 5g-viii rotation). The pin is held against the ggml-org organization's mirror (the GGUF/llama.cpp authors) at a specific git revision so a Witness on any host can curl-and-sha256 the same bytes the manifest claims. Operators download once (~5.0 GB), set XION_OPEN_WEIGHTS_GGUF_PATH to the absolute path of the downloaded file, and run xion-verify inference-sovereignty to promote this entry from NOT_YET_SEALED to OK. Operators who want the runtime daemon to serve the byte-verified blob directly run `ollama create gemma4:e4b-it-pinned -f Modelfile` against the same file and set XION_OLLAMA_FLOOR_MODEL=gemma4:e4b-it-pinned (the Ollama-published gemma4:e4b-it-q4_K_M tag is the multimodal-bundled variant — different bytes — and intentionally not pinned here; see docs/26-INFERENCE-POLICY.md § "The floor-model choice (Gemma 4 E4B-it)"). Closes the third closure-bar item for KW-INFERENCE-001 per Invariant 17 clause 2(iii) full-hash branch.
